entries.title: novel-writing preset.yaml had gates at YAML top-level instead of under preset: — gates silently ignored before fix
entries.source: QC1/QC2/QC3 fix wave — discovered during gate_failure_returns_422 test debugging
entries.note: Root cause fixed in this commit (gates moved under preset: key). Residual tracks the broader concern: serde silently ignores unknown top-level keys in YAML, so misplaced sections cause no error. Consider adding a strict-mode serde guard or loader validation that warns on unknown top-level keys in preset.yaml.
entries.closure_note: V1.43 P-last T2: added warn_unknown_top_level_keys() in loader.rs — checks serde_yaml::Value top-level keys against KNOWN_TOP_LEVEL_KEYS (preset, states, inner_graphs, signals, roles); non-fatal tracing::warn!. Added test warn_unknown_top_level_keys_detects_misplaced_gates. Commit 445e0f1d.
